Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-24 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data shows SITM commanding the #1 rank with an exceptional composite score of 96.8, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes (2.54% daily to 314% annually) and perfect passage through all four SMA gates. SITM's ratio consistency is particularly striking with 4 of 5 ratios passing thresholds, and it maintains a "clean" momentum signal with 0.84 strength while outpacing SPY by over 280% on a 1-year basis. In contrast, LBRT (#2 rank, data incomplete) shows more volatile ratio progression—its 1-week return of 24.49% is immediately undercut by a 1-month ratio of only 0.56—suggesting momentum deceleration despite solid 6-month and 1-year returns of 115% and 171%. The gap between these two leaders suggests the ranker is heavily rewarding smooth, sustained momentum curves over jagged performance, with SITM's industrial sector correlation (0.55 to XLI) indicating it is riding a broad cyclical trend rather than exhibiting isolated strength.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
